heading: Removal of Southern Utes to new reservation
label: 342 Removal of Southern Utes to new reservation
text: Nothing in this act shall be so construed as to prevent the removal of the Southern Ute Indians from their present reservation in southwestern Colorado to a new reservation by and with the consent of a majority of the adult male members of said tribe.
notes: References in TextThis act, referred to in text, is , , and is popularly known as the Indian General Allotment Act. For classification of this act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act Feb. 8, 1887, ch. 11924 Stat. 388section 331 of this title
